local_validation.notes: The focused BMF-grammar body proof now passes at 37 across Go/Rust/TypeScript and proves retained body-source tokens for Compile, HandleArgs, AsString, AsBMLString, LoadSyntax, LoadSyntaxes, ReadConfigFile, WriteConfigFile, RegisterPrimitives, and PrintCommandLineHelp. The source file execution proof passes in source and binary modes at 131071, proving forward and backward execution with restored state.

phase_gate.reason: Large BMF helper body-source retention is proven. Full semantic lowering for those retained bodies and the complete thesis companion corpus remains open.
